The thickness of the two side-frames of the door is as many
digits as the number of cubits in its height. One and a half times
this gives the thickness of the threshold and the upperblock. The
breadth of all the four pieces is an eightieth part of seven times the
door-height. An eightieth part of nine times the height (of )

gives the width of a pillaF at the bottom, and the same reduced
by a tenth is its width at the top.
